---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - blog/posts/*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, description, date]
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>

<div class="home-intro">
  <p>Experiments, notes, and small studies.</p>
</div>
